chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5481 of 2020 C.P. No. D-5482 of 2020 C.P. No. D-5483 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 03-03-2025 Mr. Abdul Zubaid Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri Advocate for Respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh These petitions pertain to claim for Group Insurance which has already been decided by Division Bench of this Court vide Judgment dated 13.10.2021 passed in C.P. No. 755 of 2020 (Sukkur). In mutatis mutandis application thereof, these petitions are hereby dismissed. Office is directed to place copy of order in connected petitions. Judge Judge Amjad PS
